articles.title: Half Man Doesn’t Age Well - Vulture
articles.description: ‘Half Man’, Richard Gadd’s overstretched ‘Baby Reindeer’ follow-up, courts our cultural fascination with how how lonely boys become violent men, but it’s more transgressive when it gets into the impossible-to-quantify nature of attraction.
